Usage: tools/public-repo-ip-check.sh [--patterns "REGEX"] [--history] [--verbose] [--staged-only] [--range RANGE] [--all-files]

Options:
  --patterns "REGEX"  Custom pattern regex
  --history           Also check full git history
  --verbose           Show matching lines (use with care)
  --staged-only       Check only staged additions
  --range RANGE       Check only a commit range
  --all-files         Scan all tracked files (diagnostic)
